communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Georgia Open Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

1. Flock Nova Audit Logs
All audit logs, access logs, event logs, and activity records generated within the Flock Safety platform reflecting use of, or access to, the Nova feature by any user associated with the Dunwoody PD organization, for the period June 30, 2025 through the date of this request.
For context, Dunwoody PD's Nova feature was enabled on or about June 30, 2025 (Flock audit event ID: 869ade3e-85d4-50b2-b426-74cae52b32eb), as reflected in existing audit records already in the city's possession.
Specifically, I request records sufficient to identify:
a. All Nova searches, queries, or lookups conducted by any Dunwoody PD user or any Flock Safety employee operating under Dunwoody credentials, including the initiating user, timestamp, search parameters, and any associated case number or stated purpose;
b. All records reflecting the results returned by Nova queries, to the extent retained by the city;
c. Any policies, procedures, training materials, or usage guidelines provided to Dunwoody PD in connection with Nova access.
2. Responsive Format
I request that records be produced in their native digital format (CSV, XLSX, JSON, or equivalent) where available, rather than printed or converted to PDF. If records exist only in a non-exportable format, please describe the format and available export options before producing.
If any costs are anticipated, please provide an itemized cost estimate — broken down by staff time, hourly rate, and any per-page or processing fees — prior to beginning production, as required by O.C.G.A. § 50-18-71.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 3 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Jason Hunyar

title: Public Data Request – September 30, 2023 Fatal Crash (Irma & Wilma Miller) – Fillmore County (Fillmore County Sheriff's Office Preston, Minnesota, Usa)

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

Dear Custodian of Records,

Pursuant to the Minnesota Government Data Practices Act (Minn. Stat. Ch. 13), I respectfully request access to the following multimedia records related to a fatal motor vehicle collision involving an Amish buggy and a Toyota 4Runner that occurred on September 30, 2023, at approximately 8:25 AM – 9:30 AM at County Road 1 near County Road 102, Sumner Township, Fillmore County, Minnesota, resulting in the deaths of Irma Miller and Wilma Miller.

Example Requested Records:

911 Audio
911 audio of the call(s) placed by passersby or involved parties on September 30, 2023, at approximately 8:25 AM – 8:45 AM, reporting a motor vehicle collision involving an Amish buggy at County Road 1 near County Road 102, Fillmore County, Minnesota. (Caller name unknown)
Body-Worn Camera – Initial Response
Body-worn camera video and audio from the first responding officer(s) at County Road 1 near County Road 102, documenting arrival, initial scene assessment, and confirmation of deceased victim(s), including Irma Miller and Wilma Miller.

Body-Worn Camera – Specific Event (Witness Statement)
Body-worn camera video and audio capturing the initial statement provided by Sarah Peterson at approximately 8:30 AM – 9:30 AM on September 30, 2023, at the crash scene, including the identification of herself as the driver of the Toyota 4Runner.

In-Car Dash Camera
In-car dash camera video and audio capturing the arrival, positioning, and on-scene activity of Fillmore County Sheriff’s Office vehicles at approximately 8:25 AM on September 30, 2023, at County Road 1 near County Road 102, including the recorded interactions at the scene.

Body-Worn Camera – Evidence Collection
Body-worn camera video and audio documenting evidence collection at the scene on September 30, 2023, including documentation of the Amish buggy wreckage, Toyota 4Runner damage, roadway debris, and the recovered items or suspected contraband.

Crime Scene Photographs
Crime scene photographs taken at County Road 1 and County Road 102 depict the impact point, final resting positions of the Amish buggy and Toyota 4Runner, and the deceased victims as documented at the scene.

Evidence Processing Photographs
Evidence processing photographs associated with Case Nos. 23-CR-24-106 and 23-CR-24-107, specifically including:
Damage to the Toyota 4Runner
The destroyed Amish buggy
the digital evidence images, such as screenshots or photographs of text messages recovered from suspect mobile devices

Body-Worn Camera / Dash Camera – Arrest or Post-Investigation Contact
Body-worn camera/ dashcam/MVR video and audio documenting the arrest, charging contact, or surrender/processing of Samantha Jo Peterson and Sarah Beth Peterson following the investigation (approximately February 2024), including the custody transfer or booking-related footage if available.

Interrogation Room Recordings
Full interview room video and audio recording(s) of the custodial or non-custodial interviews of Samantha Jo Peterson and Sarah Beth Peterson conducted by the Fillmore County Sheriff’s Office or the Minnesota Bureau of Criminal Apprehension between September 30, 2023, and February 2024.

Witness Interviews – Rochester Hy-Vee Employees
Full video and audio recording(s) of witness interviews conducted with coworkers at the Rochester Hy-Vee by the Fillmore County Sheriff’s Office following the incident, specifically regarding the statements made by the suspects about the crash or related events.

CCTV / surveillance video from Hy-Vee (Rochester, MN) for the period 7:00 AM – 10:00 AM on September 30, 2023, depicting the Peterson twins' arrival/departure or the interactions with coworkers immediately following the crash.

Incident Details:

Incident Numbers: 23-CR-24-106 and 23-CR-24-107
Victim(s): Irma Miller, Wilma Miller
Subject(s): Sarah Peterson, Samantha Jo Peterson, Sarah Beth Peterson 
Date of Incident: September 30, 2023
Time of Incident: Approximately 8:25 AM – 9:30 AM
Location of Incident: County Road 1 near County Road 102, Sumner Township, Fillmore County, Minnesota

This request seeks native digital copies of the above-listed multimedia records as maintained by your agency. I am not requesting written reports, CAD logs, transcripts, or administrative summaries at this time.

If any portion of this request is denied, please cite the specific statutory exemption for each denial and release all reasonably segregable portions of responsive records.

Please provide an itemized cost estimate prior to processing. I prefer electronic delivery via secure download link or USB drive.

If your agency does not maintain any portion of these records, please forward this request to the appropriate custodian or advise me accordingly.

Thank you for your time and assistance.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 20 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Danielle D.
